summary: Iteration 11 — full regression / bug-sweep after 10 feature iterations. Backend: 87/87 pytest pass (75 baseline + 12 NEW edge-case tests in test_edge_cases_iter11.py). Frontend: smoke test login → all 5 tabs (agenda, incassi, prossimi-lavori, riepilogo, spese) → ClientFormDialog with special chars → ESC discard → search → PWA manifest + SW. ZERO bugs found. App is production-stable.
edge_cases_verified: Apostrophe in name (L'Officina di Rossi) — create + GET + search round-trip OK; UI input accepts it.
Double quote in name (Rossi "il matto") — persisted and returned correctly.
Special chars in address (Piazza S. Pietro, 1) — stored verbatim; encodeURIComponent round-trip verified.
amount=0 with materials>0 — total_materials counted, total_incassi=0, NOT in unpaid list.
payments > toCollect (eccedenza) — client correctly excluded from unpaid; incassi summed.
Pending client with materials+payments — excluded from agenda/summary/unpaid; execute() preserves materials & payments verbatim and updates date+pending=false.
Cross-month isolation — January 2026 client invisible in December 2025 summary.
GET /summary/year?year=2030 — returns 12 empty months, all totals 0, no crash.
GET /clients?from_date=2026-01-01&to_date=2025-12-31 (reverse range) — returns [] (Mongo $gte/$lte natural behavior), no crash.
End-to-end P&L formula 1000 - 50 - 200 - 100 = 650 verified in /summary response.
Search returns BOTH pending and non-pending clients (no exclusion clause).
frontend_smoke_verified: Firebase signup + UI login → /agenda landing with 'Accesso effettuato' toast.
Navigation Agenda → Incassi → Prossimi → Riepilogo → Spese — 0 console errors, 0 pageerrors.
ClientFormDialog accepts "L'Officina di Rossi \"il matto\"" name + "Piazza S. Pietro, 1" address + 500 amount.
'Apri in Maps →' link conditionally appears once address is filled (hidden when empty).
ESC closes dialog and discards data (no client appears in Agenda after cancel).
Search input accepts apostrophe character without crash.
Sidebar nav, headers, cards: contrast OK, spacing consistent, FAB '+ Aggiungi' clearly visible.
critical_code_review_comments: _compute_summary helper is shared between /summary and /summary/year — single source of truth for monthly aggregation, no drift risk.
/clients/unpaid correctly filters: only status=lavoro_eseguito with balance>0.01, excludes pending, excludes overpaid (eccedenza), excludes amount=0 — verified by tests.
/clients/{id}/execute uses find_one_and_update with $set only on {pending,date} — preserves all other fields (materials/payments/notes/amount) atomically. Verified by TestPendingPreservation.
Search uses re.escape() on the query term → no regex-injection risk via apostrophes/parentheses, and pending clients are NOT filtered out (matches spec UX requirement).
Reverse-range query is harmless: Mongo $gte/$lte returns empty set; no 500. Could optionally short-circuit with from>to to save a DB round-trip, but not a bug.
server.py is 689 lines — under the 700-line guideline; if more endpoints are added consider splitting into routers (clients, expenses, advances, summary).
test_credentials: Per-run Firebase signup. Backend tests: testuser+edge<ts><uuid>@italserrande.test / TestPassword123!. Frontend smoke: testuser+ui<ts>@italserrande.test / TestPassword123!.
seed_data_creation: All test data is created with TEST_ prefix and deleted at end of each test. The module-scoped fixture also performs a best-effort sweep of /api/clients?month=2026-01 on teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: After 11 iterations the app is rock-solid. 87 backend pytest tests covering: auth gates, CRUD (clients/expenses/advances/recurring), pending workflow, unpaid logic, monthly+yearly summary, materials, P&L, eccedenza, special-char persistence, cross-month isolation, future empty year, reverse range, search-includes-pending, multi-user isolation. Frontend smoke covers nav + dialog + ESC + search + PWA. New file: test_edge_cases_iter11.py (12 tests, ~340 lines). XML reports: /app/test_reports/pytest/iteration_11_results.xml and iteration_11_edge.xml. Note: PnL test uses category='altro' (Expense.category is required Pydantic field).
rca of the issue: N/A — full regression sweep, no bugs found. Italian PWA Agenda Italserrande passes every edge case in the bug-sweep checklist.
